summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Latitude44 landing page. All backend APIs working correctly with graceful SendGrid fallback. Frontend fully functional with excellent responsive design, working contact form, and proper SEO implementation.

design_issues.issue: Meta description mentions 'New Zealand' but may be missing specific 'Canterbury' location keyword for better local SEO

passed_tests: Backend GET /api/ endpoint returns healthy status
Backend GET /api/health shows sendgrid_configured=false as expected
Backend POST /api/contact with valid data returns 200 success with graceful SendGrid fallback
Backend POST /api/contact with invalid email returns 422 validation error
Backend POST /api/contact with missing fields returns 422 validation errors
MongoDB persistence working - submissions stored and retrievable
Frontend landing page loads with all sections (Hero, Slider, Services, Contact, Footer)
Navbar functionality - all links present, scroll behavior working, anchor navigation functional
Hero section - video background loads, headline visible, CTAs work (scroll to contact/services)
Services slider - 3 slides visible, pagination dots functional, prev/next buttons working
Services grid - all 8 service cards displayed with proper icons and descriptions
Contact form - form submission works, success toast displayed, backend integration functional
Contact form validation - shows error messages for empty/invalid fields
Footer - logo, email link, address, navigation links all present and functional
SEO elements - title contains Latitude44 and New Zealand, favicon present, JSON-LD LocalBusiness structured data correct, Open Graph tags present
Mobile responsiveness - mobile menu button visible, navigation panel opens/closes, contact form usable on mobile
